```python
import re
def parseLog(log):
    # remove spaces, newlines and tabs
    log = re.sub(r'\s', '', log)
    # extract the template
    template = re.findall(r'(?<=[_])\d+(?=[_])', log)
    # replace variable elements with placeholders
    template = ['<*>'.join(t) for t in template]
    return template
```
